questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource:
The traffic sign is a distance beacon. This traffic sign is always placed on both sides of the road. It belongs to the group of danger signs.
The traffic sign shown is a one-lane distance beacon. The single red stripe means that there is a level crossing 80 meters away.
answerASource: A level crossing approximately 80 m ahead
answerBSource: A level crossing approximately 160 m ahead
answerCSource: A level crossing approximately 240 m ahead
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi masofa ko‘rsatkichidir. U har doim yo‘lning ikki tomoniga o‘rnatiladi va xavf belgilariga kiradi. Ko‘rsatilgan belgi bir chiziqli masofa ko‘rsatkichi bo‘lib, bitta qizil chiziq 80 metr oldinda temiryo‘l kesishmasi borligini bildiradi.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign combination indicate?
explanationSource: About 240 meters in front of you there is a railroad crossing. The level crossing ahead marker warns from this danger. Each line represents a distance of 80 m.
answerASource: - at a distance of approximately 240 m
answerBSource: - at a distance of approximately 80 m
answerCSource: - at a distance of approximately 160 m
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Oldingizda taxminan 240 metr masofada temiryo‘l kesishmasi bor. Temiryo‘l kesishmasi oldidan qo‘yiladigan masofa belgisi bu xavf haqida ogohlantiradi. Har bir chiziq 80 m masofani bildiradi.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign combination indicate?
explanationSource: Pay attention to sudden snow or ice in this area. Individual road sections can be unexpectedly slippery. Adjust your speed to the prevailing weather conditions.
answerBSource: Snowy conditions
answerCSource: Avalanches
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu hududda to‘satdan qor yoki muz paydo bo‘lishiga e’tibor bering. Yo‘lning ayrim qismlari kutilmaganda sirpanchiq bo‘lishi mumkin. Tezlikni mavjud ob-havo sharoitlariga moslashtiring.

questionTextSource: What must you anticipate with this road sign combination?
explanationSource: This combination of traffic signs indicates cattle drive, as the animals are polluting the road when passing it. For wild animals crossing there's another traffic sign.
answerBSource: Farm livestock on the roadway
answerCSource: Wild animals crossing
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasida nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi chorva hayvonlari haydalishini bildiradi, chunki hayvonlar yo‘ldan o‘tayotganda uni ifloslantirishi mumkin. Yovvoyi hayvonlar o‘tishi uchun boshqa yo‘l belgisi mavjud.

questionTextSource: What do you have to be aware of when you see this traffic sign combination?
explanationSource: The traffic signs warn you of a railroad crossing 240 meters away. From the three-lined level crossing ahead marker to the danger zone including the intersection overtaking other motor vehicles is prohibited. An overtaking maneuver in this area could endanger you and other road users.
answerASource: A rail crossing at a distance of 240 m
answerBSource: No overtaking of vehicles permitted
answerCSource: A rail crossing at a distance of 120 m
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasini ko‘rganda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l belgilari 240 metr oldinda temiryo‘l kesishmasi borligi haqida ogohlantiradi. Uch chiziqli temiryo‘l kesishmasi masofa belgisidan xavfli hududgacha, shu jumladan kesishmagacha, boshqa motorli transport vositalarini quvib o‘tish taqiqlanadi. Bu hududda quvib o‘tish sizga va boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga xavf tug‘dirishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What awaits you with this traffic sign combination?
explanationSource: The traffic sign warns you of a construction site in a distance of 100 meters. Pay close attention to the danger zone and be ready to brake in case of traffic congestion.
answerASource: A work site, commencing at a distance of approximately 100 m
answerBSource: A work site, ending at a distance of approximately 100 m
answerCSource: A work site that is approximately 100 m in length
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasida sizni nima kutmoqda?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l belgisi 100 metr masofada qurilish ishlari borligi haqida ogohlantiradi. Xavfli hududga diqqat bilan qarang va tirbandlik bo‘lsa tormozga tayyor turing.
answerATarget: Taxminan 100 m masofada boshlanadigan qurilish ishlari
answerBTarget: Taxminan 100 m masofada tugaydigan qurilish ishlari

questionTextSource: You pass by this traffic sign combination at an outside temperature of +3 °C. What should you do?
explanationSource: The combination of these traffic signs warns of sudden ice formation on this section. This often happens on bridges. Snow and ice extend the braking distance. Therefore, reduce the speed and increase the distance to the vehicle in front of you.
answerBSource: I continue driving as before, because there is nothing to indicate slippery ice
answerCSource: I immediately reduce the distance between me and the vehicle in front
questionTextTarget: Tashqi harorat +3 °C bo‘lganda bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi yonidan o‘tyapsiz. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi ushbu yo‘l qismida to‘satdan muz paydo bo‘lishi mumkinligi haqida ogohlantiradi. Bu ko‘pincha ko‘priklarda yuz beradi. Qor va muz tormoz yo‘lini uzaytiradi. Shuning uchun tezlikni kamaytiring va oldingizdagi transport vositasigacha masofani oshiring.
answerBTarget: Oldingidek davom etaman, chunki muzlama borligini ko‘rsatuvchi hech narsa yo‘q
answerCTarget: Oldimdagi transport vositasi bilan masofani darhol kamaytiraman

questionTextSource: What should you avoid when you see this danger sign?
explanationSource: The combination of these traffic signs warns of loose chippings or gravel on this section of the route. Stones and chippings can be whirled up. Therefore, avoid strong acceleration and heavy steering movements. Keep a safe distance from the vehicle in front of you.
answerBSource: Sudden steering manoeuvres
answerCSource: Driving close to the vehicle in front
questionTextTarget: Bu xavf belgisini ko‘rganda nimadan saqlanishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi ushbu yo‘l qismida bo‘sh shag‘al yoki mayda toshlar borligi haqida ogohlantiradi. Tosh va shag‘allar sachrashi mumkin. Shuning uchun kuchli tezlanish va keskin rul harakatlaridan saqlaning. Oldindagi transport vositasigacha xavfsiz masofa saqlang.
answerCTarget: Oldindagi transport vositasiga juda yaqin yurishdan

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign combination indicate?
explanationSource: In this combination, the traffic signs warn you of a moving bridge. Watch out for passing ships, for which the bridge can be tilted up or moved.
answerBSource: A ferry
answerCSource: Drainage works
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu kombinatsiyada yo‘l belgilari harakatlanuvchi ko‘prik haqida ogohlantiradi. O‘tib ketayotgan kemalarga e’tibor bering, ular uchun ko‘prik ko‘tarilishi yoki siljitilishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What must you be aware of when you see this traffic sign combination?
explanationSource: The combination of these traffic signs informs the car driver that the road leads to a shore. In poor visibility conditions such as fog or darkness, the water surface can be confused with a roadway.
answerASource: The road leads to the bank of a waterway
answerBSource: There is a risk of confusing the water surface and roadway in darkness or in poor visibility
answerCSource: An entrance exit point must be kept clear for amphibian vehicles
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasini ko‘rganda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi yo‘l suv havzasi qirg‘og‘iga olib borishini bildiradi. Tuman yoki qorong‘ilik kabi ko‘rinish yomon sharoitlarda suv yuzasi yo‘l bilan adashtirilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Yo‘l suv yo‘li qirg‘og‘iga olib boradi
answerBTarget: Qorong‘ida yoki ko‘rinish yomon bo‘lganda suv yuzasi bilan yo‘lni adashtirish xavfi bor
answerCTarget: Amfibiya transportlari uchun kirish-chiqish joyi bo‘sh qoldirilishi kerak

questionTextSource: What must you be aware of when you see this traffic sign combination?
explanationSource: The combination of these traffic signs warns of falling or fallen rocks, meaning stones may fall on the road or are already on the road. It is to be expected that vehicles driving ahead will brake suddenly to avoid falling rocks. In your own interest, you should not stop or park in these areas.
answerBSource: Stones may be lying on the roadway
answerCSource: Vehicles in front may break suddenly
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasini ko‘rganda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu belgilar toshlar qulash yoki tushib qolgan toshlar haqida ogohlantiradi, ya’ni toshlar yo‘lga tushishi yoki allaqachon yo‘lda bo‘lishi mumkin. Oldinda ketayotgan transport vositalari toshlardan qochish uchun to‘satdan tormoz berishi mumkin. O‘z xavfsizligingiz uchun bunday joylarda to‘xtamang va parkovka qilmang.
answerCTarget: Oldindagi transport vositalari to‘satdan tormoz berishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign combination indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign indicates that you will shortly be crossing a railroad crossing. A train station or underpass does not have to be present.
answerBSource: A rail underpass
answerCSource: A train station
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi yaqinda temiryo‘l kesishmasidan o‘tishingizni bildiradi. Bu yerda stansiya yoki yerosti o‘tish joyi bo‘lishi shart emas.

questionTextSource: What must you anticipate with this road sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign warns of a sharp right turn. You should be aware that oncoming vehicles could cut the curve and reach into your lane. It is also to be expected that vehicles driving ahead will brake sharply.
answerASource: You are nearing a hard right-hand bend
answerBSource: Oncoming traffic might cut the corner
answerCSource: Vehicles in front of me might slow down sharply
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi bilan nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi keskin o‘ng burilish haqida ogohlantiradi. Qarshidan kelayotgan transport vositalari burilishni kesib o‘tib, sizning yo‘lagizga kirib qolishi mumkinligini hisobga oling. Oldinda ketayotgan transport vositalari keskin tormoz berishi ham mumkin.
answerBTarget: Qarshidan kelayotgan transport burilishni kesib o‘tishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Oldimdagi transport vositalari keskin sekinlashishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What must you anticipate with this road sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign warns that cyclists can cross the road and could get into your lane, for example when a bike path ends and leads to the road.
answerASource: With cyclists who may cross the carriageway
answerBSource: With an underpass for cyclists
answerCSource: With a "cyclists prohibited" zone
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi bilan nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu belgi velosipedchilar yo‘lni kesib o‘tishi va masalan veloyo‘lak tugab yo‘lga chiqishi natijasida sizning yo‘lagizga kirishi mumkinligi haqida ogohlantiradi.
answerATarget: Qatnov qismini kesib o‘tishi mumkin bo‘lgan velosipedchilar

questionTextSource: What must you anticipate with this road sign combination?
explanationSource: This traffic sign informs about flying over the road. Sudden aircraft noise can scare a driver. Road users may be distracted by the aircraft and get distracted.
answerBSource: Other road users becoming distracted
answerCSource: An entrance to or exit from an aerodrome
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi bilan nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi yo‘l ustidan samolyotlar uchib o‘tishi haqida xabar beradi. To‘satdan samolyot shovqini haydovchini cho‘chitishi mumkin. Yo‘l ishtirokchilari samolyotga qarab chalg‘ishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: Aerodromga kirish yoki undan chiqish joyi

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign combination indicate?
explanationSource: This combination of road signs indicates a pedestrian crossing. At a pedestrian crossing, pedestrians have priority. The car driver has to allow them to cross the road.
answerBSource: An underpass for pedestrians
answerCSource: An overpass for pedestrians
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi piyodalar o‘tish joyini bildiradi. Piyodalar o‘tish joyida piyodalar ustunlikka ega. Haydovchi ularga yo‘lni kesib o‘tishga imkon berishi kerak.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This sign (triangular) indicates a danger zone in connection with horses.
answerBSource: That people on horseback have priority over motor vehicles
answerCSource: No through-traffic because of a bridle path
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu uchburchak belgi otlar bilan bog‘liq xavfli hududni bildiradi.
answerBTarget: Ot minib ketayotgan odamlar motorli transportdan ustun
answerCTarget: Ot yo‘li sabab tranzit harakat yo‘q

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign indicates that it is slippery with snow and icy roads.
answerBSource: Packed snow
answerCSource: Avalanches
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi qor va muz sabab yo‘l sirpanchiq ekanini bildiradi.

questionTextSource: What must you anticipate with this road sign?
explanationSource: This sign indicates that the road is very dirty and that you must watch out for grazing animals on the road.
answerBSource: Farm livestock on the roadway
answerCSource: Wild animals crossing
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi bilan nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu belgi yo‘l juda ifloslanganini va yo‘lda o‘tlayotgan hayvonlarga e’tibor berishingiz kerakligini bildiradi.

questionTextSource: How should you act at a point of danger indicated by this sign?
explanationSource: You should keep as much distance as possible from the vehicle in front, avoid sudden steering movements and avoid strong acceleration as there is gravel and grit on this road.
answerBSource: - avoid sudden manoeuvres
answerCSource: - maintain the greatest possible distance to the vehicle ahead
questionTextTarget: Bu belgi bilan ko‘rsatilgan xavfli joyda qanday harakat qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Oldingizdagi transport vositasi bilan imkon qadar katta masofa saqlang, keskin rul harakatlaridan va kuchli tezlanishdan saqlaning, chunki bu yo‘lda shag‘al va mayda toshlar bor.
answerCTarget: - oldindagi transport vositasigacha imkon qadar katta masofa saqlash

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This sign indicates a movable bridge.
answerBSource: A ferry
answerCSource: Drainage works
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu belgi harakatlanuvchi ko‘prikni bildiradi.

questionTextSource: What must you be aware of when you see this road traffic sign?
explanationSource: The shape of the sign indicates caution and the picture on the sign indicates what to look out for. This road leads to a shore. Water surfaces are difficult to distinguish from the actual roadway in darkness or poor visibility.
answerASource: The road leads to the bank of a waterway
answerBSource: When it is dark or visibility is poor, areas of water are difficult to distinguish from the road
answerCSource: The entrance and exit point must be kept clear for amphibious vehicles
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Belgining shakli ehtiyotkorlikni bildiradi, undagi tasvir esa nimaga e’tibor berish kerakligini ko‘rsatadi. Bu yo‘l qirg‘oqqa olib boradi. Qorong‘ida yoki ko‘rinish yomon bo‘lganda suv yuzasini haqiqiy yo‘l bilan farqlash qiyin.
answerATarget: Yo‘l suv yo‘li qirg‘og‘iga olib boradi
answerBTarget: Qorong‘ida yoki ko‘rinish yomon bo‘lganda suv yuzalarini yo‘ldan ajratish qiyin
answerCTarget: Amfibiya transportlari uchun kirish-chiqish joyi bo‘sh qoldirilishi kerak

questionTextSource: What must you be aware of when you see this road traffic sign?
explanationSource: Please watch out for stones that might be lying on the roadway. Avoid stopping and parking. Vehicles in front may suddenly slow down due to falling stones.
answerBSource: Stones may be lying on the roadway
answerCSource: Vehicles in front may brake suddenly
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lda yotgan toshlarga e’tibor bering. To‘xtash va parkovkadan saqlaning. Oldindagi transport vositalari tushayotgan toshlar sabab to‘satdan sekinlashishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: Oldindagi transport vositalari to‘satdan tormoz berishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What must you anticipate with this road sign?
explanationSource: This sign says that you should expect distractions from other road users, sudden aircraft noise and sudden braking vehicles. All answers are correct.
answerBSource: Other road users may become distracted
answerCSource: Vehicles that brake suddenly
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi bilan nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu belgi boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari chalg‘ishi, samolyotlardan to‘satdan shovqin chiqishi va transport vositalari to‘satdan tormoz berishi mumkinligini bildiradi. Barcha javoblar to‘g‘ri.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This shield (Attention) indicates a pedestrian crossing.
answerBSource: An underpass for pedestrians
answerCSource: An overpass for pedestrians
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu ogohlantirish belgisi piyodalar o‘tish joyini bildiradi.

questionTextSource: You are driving a motor vehicle with a manual gearbox. What must you consider when you see this road sign?
explanationSource: In order not to exceed the speed on the slope, you may have to brake lightly throughout. If the brake heats up, the braking effect will diminish over time. Bear in mind that this also increases the braking distance. To avoid unnecessary strain on the brake, you can select lower gears to increase the engine braking effect.
answerBSource: Applying the brakes for a longer time will diminish the braking response
answerCSource: The braking response will be better if no gear is engaged
questionTextTarget: Siz mexanik uzatmali motorli transport vositasini boshqaryapsiz. Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nimani hisobga olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Nishabda tezlik oshib ketmasligi uchun uzoq vaqt yengil tormoz berishingizga to‘g‘ri kelishi mumkin. Tormoz qizib ketsa, vaqt o‘tishi bilan tormozlash ta’siri kamayadi. Bu tormoz yo‘lini ham uzaytirishini hisobga oling. Tormozga ortiqcha yuk tushirmaslik uchun dvigatel tormozlash ta’sirini oshirish maqsadida pastroq uzatmani tanlashingiz mumkin.
answerBTarget: Uzoq vaqt tormoz bosish tormoz ta’sirini kamaytiradi
answerCTarget: Uzatma ulanmagan bo‘lsa, tormoz ta’siri yaxshiroq bo‘ladi

questionTextSource: You are driving a motor vehicle with a manual gearbox. What is the correct thing to do when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: In order to maintain the speed on the incline, you may have to shift down a gear, as otherwise the torque may not be sufficient to propel the vehicle further at the low speed.
answerASource: I change down to a lower gear if necessary
answerBSource: I always change up to a higher gear
answerCSource: I drive down this descent carefully
questionTextTarget: Siz mexanik uzatmali motorli transport vositasini boshqaryapsiz. Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Ko‘tarilishda tezlikni saqlash uchun kerak bo‘lsa pastroq uzatmaga o‘tishingiz kerak, aks holda past tezlikda transport vositasini oldinga tortish uchun aylantiruvchi kuch yetarli bo‘lmasligi mumkin.

questionTextSource: When must you wait at this traffic sign?
explanationSource:
The diagonal cross in front of a railroad crossing signals the right of way for rail traffic. When a rail vehicle approaches, you have to wait in front of the sign. The same applies if railway staff waves a white-red-white flag. If you are in danger of comingThe diagonal cross in front of a railroad crossing signals the right of way for rail traffic. When a rail vehicle approaches, you have to wait in front of the sign. The same applies if railway staff waves a white-red-white flag. If you are in danger of coming to a stop on the railroad crossing due to traffic jams, you must also wait in front of the diagonal cross until you can quickly cross the railroad crossing.
to a stop on the railroad crossing due to traffic jams, you must also wait in front of the diagonal cross until you can quickly cross the railroad crossing.
answerASource: When a railway employee is waving a white-red-white flag
answerBSource: When the level crossing cannot be crossed without having to stop on it
answerCSource: When a rail vehicle is approaching
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi oldida qachon kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Temiryo‘l kesishmasi oldidagi diagonal xoch relsli transport ustunligini bildiradi. Relsli transport yaqinlashganda belgi oldida kutishingiz kerak. Temiryo‘l xodimi oq-qizil-oq bayroqni silkiganda ham xuddi shunday. Agar tirbandlik sabab temiryo‘l kesishmasida to‘xtab qolish xavfi bo‘lsa, kesishmadan tez o‘ta olmaguncha diagonal xoch oldida kutishingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: Temiryo‘l kesishmasidan to‘xtab qolmasdan o‘tib bo‘lmaganda

questionTextSource: What do you do when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "Turn right here in front of the sign" only allows you to drive to the right. Even if there is only this one option, the change of the direction of travel needs to be indicated.
answerBSource: You may only proceed to the right
answerCSource: You may not turn right
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: “Belgi oldidan shu yerda o‘ngga buriling” belgisi faqat o‘ngga harakatlanishga ruxsat beradi. Faqat bitta imkoniyat bo‘lsa ham, harakat yo‘nalishi o‘zgarishini signal bilan bildirishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What do you do when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "Turn left here in front of the sign" only allows to continue the drive to the left. Although there is only this one option, the change of the direction of travel needs to be indicated.
answerBSource: You may only proceed to the left
answerCSource: You may not proceed to the left
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: “Belgi oldidan shu yerda chapga buriling” belgisi faqat chapga harakatni davom ettirishga ruxsat beradi. Faqat bitta imkoniyat bo‘lsa ham, harakat yo‘nalishi o‘zgarishini signal bilan bildirishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: In which directions may you proceed?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "You must go straight or turn right" prohibits turning to the left. Allowed are only the other directions straight ahead and right. If you turn to the right, you must indicate the change of direction.
answerBSource: To the right
answerCSource: To the left
questionTextTarget: Qaysi yo‘nalishlarda davom etishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: “To‘g‘ri yoki o‘ngga yurish shart” belgisi chapga burilishni taqiqlaydi. Faqat to‘g‘ri va o‘ng yo‘nalishlarga ruxsat beriladi. O‘ngga burilsangiz, yo‘nalish o‘zgarishini signal bilan bildirishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What must you do when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "Keep right of traffic" indicates that you have to drive past an obstacle on the right. These include traffic islands, construction sites or bus stops. If there is an intersection or T-junction before the marked point, you may turn right as well as left. If you swing out while driving around an obstacle, you have to indicate that.
answerASource: You must pass on the right of traffic islands
answerBSource: You are obliged to turn right
answerCSource: You may not turn left in front of this sign
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: “To‘siqni o‘ngdan aylanib o‘ting” belgisi to‘siq yonidan o‘ng tomondan o‘tishingiz kerakligini bildiradi. Bunga xavfsizlik orolchalari, qurilish joylari yoki avtobus bekatlari kiradi. Agar belgilangan joydan oldin chorraha yoki T-kesishma bo‘lsa, o‘ngga ham, chapga ham burilishingiz mumkin. To‘siqni aylanib o‘tayotganda yo‘nalishni o‘zgartirsangiz, signal berishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Transport orolchalarining o‘ng tomonidan o‘tishingiz kerak
answerCTarget: Bu belgidan oldin chapga burilishingiz mumkin emas

questionTextSource: You are approaching a bus stop marked like this. What do you do if you see children there?
explanationSource: This stop is a bus stop where school buses operate at the times indicated. If you approach this stop, you will have to expect children who suddenly run onto the road; the principle of trust does not apply in this case. If a school bus is in the passenger bay or on the street, you have to be able to brake as a car driver; You may only drive past at walking speed.
answerASource: Reduce your speed and be ready to brake
answerBSource: A reduction in speed is only necessary when a school bus is stopping there
answerCSource: Speed must not be reduced when a bus stops at a stopping bay
questionTextTarget: Siz shunday belgilangan avtobus bekatiga yaqinlashyapsiz. U yerda bolalarni ko‘rsangiz nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Bu maktab avtobuslari ko‘rsatilgan vaqtlarda xizmat qiladigan avtobus bekati. Bu bekatga yaqinlashganda bolalar to‘satdan yo‘lga yugurib chiqishini kutishingiz kerak; bu holatda ishonch tamoyili amal qilmaydi. Maktab avtobusi yo‘lovchi cho‘ntagida yoki ko‘chada bo‘lsa, haydovchi sifatida tormoz bera olishingiz kerak; faqat piyoda tezligida yonidan o‘tishingiz mumkin.
answerBTarget: Tezlikni kamaytirish faqat maktab avtobusi u yerda to‘xtaganda zarur
answerCTarget: Avtobus to‘xtash cho‘ntagida to‘xtaganda tezlikni kamaytirish mumkin emas

questionTextSource: What must you remember when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "pedestrian area" prohibits motor vehicles entering this area, even walking speed is prohibited. This also applies to residents. In shopping areas, additional signs often allow entry at certain times. That is not given here.
answerASource: You may not drive a motor vehicle in this pedestrian precinct
answerBSource: You may drive a motor vehicle at walking speed in this pedestrian precinct
answerCSource: Residents may drive motor vehicles in this pedestrian precinct
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: “Piyodalar hududi” belgisi motorli transport vositalarining bu hududga kirishini taqiqlaydi, hatto piyoda tezligida ham. Bu aholiga ham taalluqli. Savdo hududlarida qo‘shimcha belgilar ko‘pincha ma’lum vaqtlarda kirishga ruxsat beradi. Bu yerda bunday ruxsat yo‘q.
answerATarget: Bu piyodalar hududida motorli transport vositasini haydashingiz mumkin emas
answerBTarget: Bu piyodalar hududida motorli transport vositasini piyoda tezligida haydashingiz mumkin
answerCTarget: Aholi bu piyodalar hududida motorli transport vositasini haydashi mumkin

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are not allowed to drive here?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "No Motorbikes Permitted" only applies to mopeds. It does not apply to mopeds and light motorcycles. The low speed of motorbikes would hinder the flow of traffic on this road.
answerBSource: Small motorcycles
answerCSource: Light motorcycles
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda qaysi transport vositalariga harakatlanish taqiqlangan?
explanationTarget: “Mototsikllar taqiqlangan” belgisi motorli velosipedlarga taalluqli. Bu mopedlar va yengil mototsikllarga taalluqli emas. Motorli velosipedlarning past tezligi bu yo‘lda harakat oqimiga xalaqit berishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What must you remember when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "Do not enter" forbids the entrance to the street or road without exception for all vehicles including bicycles. Bicycles may only enter if permitted by an additional sign. Vehicles come out of this lane. It always appears at the exit of a one-way street or the end of a motorway exit.
answerASource: Vehicles may come out of this road
answerBSource: You may not enter this road
answerCSource: You may enter this road
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: “Kirish taqiqlangan” belgisi bu ko‘cha yoki yo‘lga barcha turdagi transport vositalari, shu jumladan velosipedlar uchun ham kirishni istisnosiz taqiqlaydi. Velosipedlarga faqat qo‘shimcha belgi bilan ruxsat berilgan bo‘lsa kirish mumkin. Bu yo‘ldan transport vositalari chiqib keladi. Belgi odatda bir tomonlama ko‘chaning chiqishida yoki avtomagistral chiqishining oxirida joylashadi.
answerATarget: Bu yo‘ldan transport vositalari chiqib kelishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What must you remember when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "Absolutely no stopping" prohibits drivers to wait or stop, unless it is due to the traffic situation, such as a red traffic light or another compelling traffic situation. It's prohibited to let people enter or exit or to load/unload the vehicle.
answerBSource: You may stop for loading and unloading
answerCSource: You may stop to let passengers out
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: “Mutlaq to‘xtash taqiqlangan” belgisi haydovchilarga kutish yoki to‘xtashni taqiqlaydi, faqat qizil svetofor yoki boshqa majburiy harakat vaziyati kabi transport sharoiti sabab to‘xtash bundan mustasno. Odamlarni tushirish yoki chiqarish, shuningdek yuk ortish yoki tushirish taqiqlanadi.
answerBTarget: Yuk ortish va tushirish uchun to‘xtashingiz mumkin

questionTextSource: What is allowed at this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The sign "No parking. Waiting is allowed." sign allows you to wait for up to three minutes. Situations of loading and unloading or getting in and out of the car may also take longer. The car driver must be in the immediate vicinity of the vehicle.
answerASource: Stopping for loading or unloading, for alighting or boarding vehicles
answerBSource: Waiting up to 3 minutes
answerCSource: Parking, provided a parking disc is used
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisida nimaga ruxsat berilgan?
explanationTarget: “Parkovka taqiqlangan. Kutishga ruxsat berilgan” belgisi uch daqiqagacha kutishga ruxsat beradi. Yuk ortish-tushirish yoki avtomobilga chiqish-tushish holatlari uzoqroq davom etishi mumkin. Haydovchi transport vositasining bevosita yaqinida bo‘lishi kerak.
answerATarget: Yuk ortish yoki tushirish, transport vositasiga chiqish yoki undan tushish uchun to‘xtash

questionTextSource: What is permitted where you see these traffic signs?
explanationSource: The sign "No parking. Waiting is allowed." allows you to stop in order to let people get in and out, or to load and unload. The parking lot is reserved for a car driver with a disability card and a personalized parking card. Only these people have the right to park in this place and are allowed to let illegally parked vehicles be towed away.
answerASource: Severely disabled persons with the appropriate numbered parking permit may park here
answerBSource: Anyone is allowed to stop to pick up or drop passengers
answerCSource: With a parking ticket from a parking-ticket machine (Parkscheinautomat), anyone is allowed to park here for an unlimited period
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari joyida nimaga ruxsat berilgan?
explanationTarget: “Parkovka taqiqlangan. Kutishga ruxsat berilgan” belgisi odamlarni tushirish yoki chiqarish, shuningdek yuk ortish va tushirish uchun to‘xtashga ruxsat beradi. Parkovka joyi nogironlik guvohnomasi va shaxsiy parkovka ruxsatnomasi bo‘lgan haydovchi uchun ajratilgan. Faqat shu shaxslar bu joyda parkovka qilish huquqiga ega va noqonuniy parkovka qilingan transport vositalarini evakuatsiya qildirishlari mumkin.
answerATarget: Tegishli raqamli parkovka ruxsatnomasi bo‘lgan og‘ir nogiron shaxslar bu yerda parkovka qilishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Har kim yo‘lovchi olib yoki tushirish uchun to‘xtashi mumkin
answerCTarget: Parkovka avtomatidan chipta olinsa, har kim bu yerda cheksiz muddat parkovka qilishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What is true in the case of this traffic sign combination?
explanationSource: The additional sign indicates that cycle traffic could be coming from the left and right. Therefore, even if you only want to turn right, pay attention to both directions. Electric scooters are becoming more common, they ride on the cycle path, so watch out for scooter riders as well.
answerASource: - watching out for cyclists coming from the left and right
answerBSource: - watching out for electric scooter traffic coming from the left and right
answerCSource: - only watching out for motor vehicle traffic coming from the left and right on the priority road
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasida nima to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Qo‘shimcha belgi velosiped harakati chapdan ham, o‘ngdan ham kelishi mumkinligini bildiradi. Shuning uchun faqat o‘ngga burilmoqchi bo‘lsangiz ham, ikkala yo‘nalishga e’tibor bering. Elektr skuterlar tobora ko‘paymoqda, ular veloyo‘lakda yuradi, shuning uchun skuter haydovchilariga ham e’tibor bering.
answerATarget: - chap va o‘ngdan kelayotgan velosipedchilarga e’tibor berish
answerBTarget: - chap va o‘ngdan kelayotgan elektr skuter harakatiga e’tibor berish
answerCTarget: - faqat ustun yo‘lda chap va o‘ngdan kelayotgan motorli transportga e’tibor berish

questionTextSource: What vehicles may enter a cycle highway that has this sign?
explanationSource: Vehicular traffic other than cyclists is not allowed to use cycle lanes unless permitted by additional signs. The additional sign allows residents to enter the cycle lane.
answerBSource: All mopeds with a maximum design speed less than 25 km/h
answerCSource: All cars, provided they travel at walking speed
questionTextTarget: Bu belgi bor velomagistralga qaysi transport vositalari kirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Velosipedchilardan boshqa transport harakati veloyo‘laklardan foydalanishi mumkin emas, agar qo‘shimcha belgi bilan ruxsat berilmagan bo‘lsa. Qo‘shimcha belgi aholiga veloyo‘lakka kirishga ruxsat beradi.
answerATarget: Aholi tomonidan boshqariladigan barcha transport vositalari
answerBTarget: Konstruktiv maksimal tezligi 25 km/soatdan kam bo‘lgan barcha mopedlar

questionTextSource: What is true in relation to yellow road markings?
explanationSource: Yellow lane markings are placed temporarily, e.g. to change the course of the lane due to a construction site. The white lane markings are replaced by the yellow ones.
answerASource: - are only applied temporarily (at construction sites for example)
answerBSource: - replace the validity of white road markings
answerCSource: - only apply to construction site traffic
questionTextTarget: Sariq yo‘l chiziqlari haqida nima to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Sariq yo‘lak chiziqlari vaqtincha qo‘yiladi, masalan qurilish joyi sabab yo‘lak yo‘nalishini o‘zgartirish uchun. Oq yo‘lak chiziqlari sariq chiziqlar bilan almashtiriladi.
answerATarget: - faqat vaqtincha qo‘llaniladi, masalan qurilish joylarida
answerBTarget: - oq yo‘l chiziqlarining amal qilishini almashtiradi
answerCTarget: - faqat qurilish joyi harakati uchun amal qiladi

questionTextSource: What is true in this situation?
explanationSource: A restricted area may not be driven on as a matter of principle.
answerASource: - not drive on the restricted zone
answerBSource: - use the restricted zone to make a turn
answerCSource: - use the restricted zone if there is a traffic jam
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nima to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Cheklangan hudud ustidan yurish, qoida tariqasida, mumkin emas.

questionTextSource: What vehicles may enter a zone with this sign?
explanationSource: The traffic sign shows a bicycle zone with the additional sign "Anleger frei". In bicycle zones, the rule of "right before left" applies. Cyclists, very small electric vehicles and other authorised vehicles are allowed to travel at a maximum speed of 30 km/h in bicycle zones. Cyclists and very small electric vehicles may ride side by side in bicycle zones. The additional sign also allows residents to ride in the bicycle zone.
answerBSource: Small electric vehicles
answerCSource: Vehicles driven by residents
questionTextTarget: Bu belgi bor hududga qaysi transport vositalari kirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l belgisi “aholiga ruxsat” qo‘shimcha belgisi bilan velosiped hududini ko‘rsatadi. Velosiped hududlarida “o‘ngdan kelganga yo‘l ber” qoidasi amal qiladi. Velosipedchilar, juda kichik elektr transport vositalari va boshqa ruxsat berilgan transport vositalari velosiped hududlarida maksimal 30 km/soat tezlikda harakatlanishi mumkin. Velosipedchilar va juda kichik elektr transport vositalari yonma-yon yurishi mumkin. Qo‘shimcha belgi aholiga ham velosiped hududida yurishga ruxsat beradi.

questionTextSource: Within a built-up area, what should you note when driving on a road where this traffic sign combination is displayed?
explanationSource: The one-way street sign also applies to cyclists, but with this traffic sign combination they are allowed to ride in both directions. Please note, however, that when overtaking cyclists in built-up areas, a minimum lateral distance of 1.5 m must always be maintained.
answerASource: Cyclists may move in my direction
answerBSource: When overtaking cyclists, I have to maintain a minimum passing distance of 1.5 m
answerCSource: Cyclists have to use the footpaths to the left and right of the roadway
questionTextTarget: Aholi yashash hududida bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi o‘rnatilgan yo‘lda haydashda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bir tomonlama ko‘cha belgisi velosipedchilarga ham taalluqli, ammo bu belgi kombinatsiyasi bilan ularga ikkala yo‘nalishda yurishga ruxsat berilgan. Shunga qaramay, aholi yashash hududida velosipedchilarni quvib o‘tayotganda kamida 1,5 m yon masofa doimo saqlanishi kerak.
answerATarget: Velosipedchilar mening yo‘nalishimga qarab harakatlanishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Velosipedchilarni quvib o‘tayotganda kamida 1,5 m o‘tish masofasini saqlashim kerak
answerCTarget: Velosipedchilar yo‘lning chap va o‘ng tomonidagi piyodalar yo‘laklaridan foydalanishi kerak

questionTextSource: This traffic sign is displayed on the right-hand kerbside. What does it mean?
explanationSource: The traffic sign indicates an absolute no-stopping zone in the area in front of and behind the traffic sign. The arrow pointing to the left indicates that you are not allowed to stop after the sign, the arrow pointing to the right indicates that you are not allowed to stop in front of the sign.
answerBSource: - not stop after it
answerCSource: - park before it
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi o‘ng bordyur tomonida joylashgan. Bu nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l belgisi o‘zidan oldingi va keyingi hududda mutlaq to‘xtash taqiqini bildiradi. Chapga qaragan strelka belgidan keyin to‘xtash mumkin emasligini, o‘ngga qaragan strelka esa belgi oldida to‘xtash mumkin emasligini bildiradi.

questionTextSource: This traffic sign is displayed on the right-hand kerbside. What does it indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign signals the beginning of an absolute prohibition to stop from the traffic sign. The arrow pointing to the left shows that the prohibition of stopping begins from the sign.
answerASource: - the start of an absolute no-stopping zone
answerBSource: - the end of an absolute no-stopping zone
answerCSource: - the start of a limited prohibition of stopping zone
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi o‘ng bordyur tomonida joylashgan. Bu nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Belgi shu belgidan boshlab mutlaq to‘xtash taqiqi boshlanishini bildiradi. Chapga qaragan strelka to‘xtash taqiqi belgidan boshlab boshlanishini ko‘rsatadi.

questionTextSource: What do you have to be aware of when you see with this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The traffic sign indicates an absolute no-stopping zone in this area. You are not allowed to stop there.
answerBSource: - may stop to quickly load my vehicle
answerCSource: - may stop to allow passengers to exit my vehicle
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Belgi bu hududda mutlaq to‘xtash taqiqi borligini bildiradi. U yerda to‘xtashingiz mumkin emas.
answerBTarget: - transport vositasiga tez yuk ortish uchun to‘xtash mumkin

questionTextSource: What is the right thing in this situation?
explanationSource: The sign indicates that you must give priority to oncoming traffic at the bottleneck. The vehicle coming towards you is already close to the bottleneck, so you must wait and may only drive after the car coming towards you.
answerASource: - after the oncoming [car] has done so
answerBSource: - before the oncoming [car] has done so
answerCSource: - at walking speed only
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat nima?
explanationTarget: Belgi tor joyda qarshidan kelayotgan transportga ustunlik berishingiz kerakligini bildiradi. Qarshidan kelayotgan avtomobil tor joyga allaqachon yaqin, shuning uchun kutishingiz va faqat u o‘tib bo‘lgandan keyin yurishingiz mumkin.

questionTextSource: When may you stop here?
explanationSource: The absolute stopping ban only applies on working days. You are allowed to stop here on Sundays and public holidays.
answerBSource: On public holidays
answerCSource: On Saturdays
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda qachon to‘xtashingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Mutlaq to‘xtash taqiqi faqat ish kunlarida amal qiladi. Yakshanba va bayram kunlari bu yerda to‘xtashingiz mumkin.

questionTextSource: What applies at this junction?
explanationSource:
The blue traffic signs, with the white bicycle in the middle, indicate a bicycle street. This road may only be used by bicycles, unless otherwise expressly indicated by other traffic signs. In addition, the triangular traffic sign “Give way” indicates that cross traffic must be given priority.
You do not necessarily have to stop at the traffic sign “Give way” and you can cross the intersection carefully as there is no traffic visible from the right or left.
answerBSource: - turn right
answerCSource: - turn left
questionTextTarget: Bu kesishmada qanday qoida amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: O‘rtasida oq velosiped belgisi bo‘lgan ko‘k yo‘l belgilari velosiped ko‘chasini bildiradi. Bu yo‘ldan faqat velosipedlar foydalanishi mumkin, agar boshqa yo‘l belgilarida boshqacha aniq ko‘rsatilmagan bo‘lsa. Bundan tashqari, uchburchak “Yo‘l bering” belgisi kesishuvchi transportga ustunlik berish kerakligini bildiradi. “Yo‘l bering” belgisi oldida albatta to‘xtash shart emas va o‘ng yoki chapdan transport ko‘rinmayotgani uchun kesishmadan ehtiyotkorlik bilan o‘tishingiz mumkin.

questionTextSource: What does this road sign indicate?
explanationSource: Basically, the traffic sign “Prohibited all types of vehicles” means that vehicles are not allowed to drive on the road. However, motorcycles or bicycles may be pushed.
answerBSource: - drive at walking speed
answerCSource: - drive as residents
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Asosan “Barcha turdagi transport vositalari taqiqlangan” belgisi transport vositalarining bu yo‘lda harakatlanishiga ruxsat yo‘qligini bildiradi. Biroq mototsikl yoki velosipedlarni itarib olib o‘tish mumkin.

questionTextSource: You are driving on a one-way street with signposting. What is correct?
explanationSource:
The direction of travel on a one-way street is always indicated by the white arrow on the traffic sign. If you are on your one-way street, you are allowed to park on the right or left side of the road in the direction of travel. 
In order not to obstruct the traffic behind you when turning left, you must move as far to the left as possible. This leaves enough space for vehicles that want to go straight or turn right.
answerASource: I have to get as far to the left as possible in order to turn left
answerBSource: I may also park on the left-hand side of the road
answerCSource: I may park against the direction of traffic
questionTextTarget: Siz belgilar bilan ko‘rsatilgan bir tomonlama ko‘chada ketyapsiz. Qaysi javob to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Bir tomonlama ko‘chada harakat yo‘nalishi doimo yo‘l belgisidagi oq strelka bilan ko‘rsatiladi. Bir tomonlama ko‘chada harakat yo‘nalishi bo‘yicha yo‘lning o‘ng yoki chap tomonida parkovka qilishingiz mumkin. Chapga burilayotganda ortingizdagi transportga xalaqit bermaslik uchun imkon qadar chapga joylashishingiz kerak. Bu to‘g‘ri yurmoqchi yoki o‘ngga burilmoqchi bo‘lgan transportlar uchun yetarli joy qoldiradi.
answerATarget: Chapga burilish uchun imkon qadar chapga joylashishim kerak
answerBTarget: Yo‘lning chap tomonida ham parkovka qilishim mumkin
answerCTarget: Harakat yo‘nalishiga qarshi parkovka qilishim mumkin

questionTextSource: What do you do when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The road is too narrow for two lanes. The traffic sign regulates the right of way. The oncoming traffic is granted priority. If you are met by vehicles, you must stop early and allow oncoming traffic to pass.
answerASource: You must give precedence to oncoming traffic
answerBSource: You are not allowed to turn
answerCSource: You take precedence over oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l ikki yo‘lak uchun juda tor. Yo‘l belgisi ustunlikni tartibga soladi. Qarshidan kelayotgan transportga ustunlik beriladi. Agar qarshingizdan transport kelsa, erta to‘xtab, unga o‘tishga imkon berishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Qarshidan kelayotgan transportga ustunlik berishingiz kerak

questionTextSource: In which directions are you allowed to continue?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "You" only allows turning to the right or left" only allows you to turn left or right. The desired direction of travel needs to be indicated. You are not allowed to drive straight ahead.
answerBSource: To the right
answerCSource: Straight ahead
questionTextTarget: Qaysi yo‘nalishlarda davom etishingizga ruxsat berilgan?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi faqat o‘ngga yoki chapga burilishga ruxsat beradi. Tanlangan harakat yo‘nalishi signal bilan bildirilishi kerak. To‘g‘ri yurishga ruxsat yo‘q.

questionTextSource: A school bus is stopping on the roadway approximately 80 m in front of you. Can this be dangerous?
explanationSource: If a school bus stops in front of you on the road about 80 m away, you have to expect the following: Children could suddenly run on/off the road to reach the bus, for example, by the shortest route. This danger exists even if school crossing guards secure the traffic. You have to be ready to brake and you are only allowed to drive past the school bus at walking speed.
answerASource: Yes, because children frequently run across the road to catch the bus
answerBSource: Yes, because children do not always take the shortest route to cross the roadway
answerCSource: No, because school crossing patrols regulate traffic at every school bus stop
questionTextTarget: Maktab avtobusi sizdan taxminan 80 m oldinda qatnov qismida to‘xtamoqda. Bu xavfli bo‘lishi mumkinmi?
explanationTarget: Agar maktab avtobusi yo‘lda sizdan taxminan 80 m oldinda to‘xtasa, bolalar avtobusga eng qisqa yo‘l bilan yetib olish uchun to‘satdan yo‘lga yugurib chiqishi yoki yo‘ldan chiqishi mumkinligini kutishingiz kerak. Bu xavf maktab o‘tish nazoratchilari harakatni tartibga solayotgan bo‘lsa ham mavjud. Tormozga tayyor turishingiz va maktab avtobusi yonidan faqat piyoda tezligida o‘tishingiz mumkin.
answerATarget: Ha, chunki bolalar avtobusga ulgurish uchun ko‘pincha yo‘lni kesib yuguradi
answerBTarget: Ha, chunki bolalar yo‘lni kesib o‘tishda har doim eng qisqa yo‘lni tanlamaydi
answerCTarget: Yo‘q, chunki har bir maktab avtobusi bekatida maktab patrullari harakatni tartibga soladi

questionTextSource: Who is allowed to drive a motor vehicle on this road?
explanationSource: The street is a declared sidewalk, with the additional sign "delivery vehicles only". Therefore, this road may only be used by a distributor with a motor vehicle. The distributor must be able to prove that he has to deliver something in this street. He has to drive at walking speed, regardless of whether or not pedestrians pass the street. He has to take care of pedestrians.
answerBSource: Shoppers
answerCSource: Visitors
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘lda kim motorli transport vositasini boshqarishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Ko‘cha piyodalar yo‘lagi sifatida belgilangan va qo‘shimcha belgida “faqat yetkazib beruvchi transport vositalari” deb ko‘rsatilgan. Shuning uchun bu yo‘ldan faqat tovar yetkazib beruvchi shaxs motorli transport vositasi bilan foydalanishi mumkin. U shu ko‘chada biror narsa yetkazib berishi kerakligini isbotlay olishi kerak. Piyodalar bor-yo‘qligidan qat’i nazar, piyoda tezligida yurishi va piyodalarga e’tibor berishi kerak.

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are allowed to use the special lane marked like this?
explanationSource: The lane shown here is intended for public buses. Only they are allowed to use this lane. For all other drivers the use of this lane is prohibited.
answerBSource: Trucks
answerCSource: Cars
questionTextTarget: Bunday belgilangan maxsus yo‘lakdan qaysi transport vositalari foydalanishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Bu yerda ko‘rsatilgan yo‘lak jamoat avtobuslari uchun mo‘ljallangan. Faqat ular bu yo‘lakdan foydalanishi mumkin. Boshqa barcha haydovchilar uchun bu yo‘lakdan foydalanish taqiqlangan.

questionTextSource: Who is allowed to enter a street sign-posted like this?
explanationSource: The additional sign indicates that drivers who have to go on errands in this street privately, or for business reasons may enter. Residents and visitors are customers of shops, patients of medical practices as well as people who live in this street and their visitors. Through traffic is prohibited in this street.
answerBSource: People visiting residents
answerCSource: Through-traffic
questionTextTarget: Bunday belgilangan ko‘chaga kim kirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Qo‘shimcha belgi shuni bildiradiki, bu ko‘chada shaxsiy yoki ish sababli yumushlari bor haydovchilar kirishi mumkin. Aholi va mehmonlar — do‘kon mijozlari, tibbiy amaliyot bemorlari, shu ko‘chada yashovchilar va ularning mehmonlaridir. Bu ko‘chada tranzit harakat taqiqlangan.

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are not allowed to use a road sign-posted like this?
explanationSource: Cars, but also other multi-lane motor vehicles, may not drive on a road with this sign. These include cars, trucks and buses. The ban does not apply to motorcycles, including side cars, and non-motorized vehicles.
answerBSource: Cars
answerCSource: Motorcycles
questionTextTarget: Bunday belgilangan yo‘ldan qaysi transport vositalari foydalana olmaydi?
explanationTarget: Avtomobillar va boshqa ko‘p izli motorli transport vositalari bu belgi bor yo‘lda harakatlana olmaydi. Bunga avtomobillar, yuk mashinalari va avtobuslar kiradi. Taqiq mototsikllarga, shu jumladan yon aravachali mototsikllarga va motorsiz transport vositalariga taalluqli emas.

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are not allowed to use a road sign-posted like this?
explanationSource: This round road sign with the red border prohibits the passage for cyclists. It usually can be found on roads where you are allowed to drive fast and where a cyclist can get into dangerous situations due to his or her low speed. Motorized vehicles such as motorcycles and cars may continue here.
answerBSource: Motorcycles
answerCSource: Cars
questionTextTarget: Bunday belgilangan yo‘ldan qaysi transport vositalari foydalana olmaydi?
explanationTarget: Qizil hoshiyali dumaloq belgi velosipedchilarning o‘tishini taqiqlaydi. U odatda tez yurishga ruxsat berilgan va velosipedchi past tezligi sabab xavfli vaziyatga tushib qolishi mumkin bo‘lgan yo‘llarda uchraydi. Mototsikl va avtomobil kabi motorli transport vositalari bu yerda davom etishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are not allowed to use a road sign-posted like this?
explanationSource: A round traffic sign with a red border indicates a general traffic ban for vehicles. If the circle contains a symbol, the types of vehicles to which the traffic ban applies are specified more precisely. Here the road may not be used by motorcyclists.
answerBSource: Cars
answerCSource: Trucks
questionTextTarget: Bunday belgilangan yo‘ldan qaysi transport vositalari foydalana olmaydi?
explanationTarget: Qizil hoshiyali dumaloq yo‘l belgisi transport vositalari uchun umumiy harakat taqiqini bildiradi. Agar doira ichida ramz bo‘lsa, taqiq qaysi transport turlariga tegishli ekanini aniqroq ko‘rsatadi. Bu yerda yo‘ldan mototsiklchilar foydalana olmaydi.

questionTextSource: What do these traffic signs indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "Do not enter" forbids car drivers to enter this road with vehicles of all kinds. The additional sign makes it clear that this prohibition applies only in 100 meters. It does not explicitly state for how long. Always expect that vehicles can come out of this road.
answerBSource: A one-way street 100 m long
answerCSource: A customs post 100 m ahead
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: “Kirish taqiqlangan” belgisi haydovchilarga har qanday turdagi transport vositasi bilan bu yo‘lga kirishni taqiqlaydi. Qo‘shimcha belgi bu taqiq faqat 100 metrdan keyin amal qilishini bildiradi. U qancha davom etishini aniq ko‘rsatmaydi. Har doim bu yo‘ldan transport vositalari chiqib kelishi mumkinligini kuting.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign indicates the beginning of a zone with a maximum speed of 30 km/h. It is often set up in residential areas and only once at the beginning. You are not allowed to drive faster than 30 km / h in the entire area. This speed limit is canceled with the "End of the 30 km/h zone" sign.
answerASource: - a permitted maximum speed of 30 km/h
answerBSource: - an obligatory minimum speed of 30 km/h
answerCSource: - a recommended speed of 30 km/h
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi maksimal tezlik 30 km/soat bo‘lgan hudud boshlanishini bildiradi. U ko‘pincha turar joy hududlarida faqat boshida o‘rnatiladi. Butun hududda 30 km/soatdan tez yurishingiz mumkin emas. Bu tezlik cheklovi “30 km/soat hududi tugadi” belgisi bilan bekor qilinadi.

questionTextSource: A traffic calmed commercial zone (verkehrsberuhigter Bereich) starts here. What must you do?
explanationSource: In a traffic calming zone with shops, road users are often distracted by the displays in the shop windows. You must therefore pay attention to rain and inattentive foot traffic. Your maximum speed is 20 km/h. This is a no parking, but waiting allowed zone and you're obliged to use your parking disc. To offer parking to many customers, the maximum parking time is two hours.
answerASource: You must specifically watch out for busy pedestrian traffic
answerBSource: You must pay attention to the allowed maximum parking time
answerCSource: You must observe a minimum speed of 20 km/h
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda tinchlantirilgan tijorat hududi boshlanadi. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Do‘konlar bor tinchlantirilgan hududda yo‘l ishtirokchilari ko‘pincha vitrinadagi narsalarga chalg‘iydi. Shuning uchun gavjum va e’tiborsiz piyoda harakatiga e’tibor berishingiz kerak. Maksimal tezlik 20 km/soat. Bu parkovka taqiqlangan, ammo kutishga ruxsat berilgan hudud bo‘lib, parkovka diskidan foydalanishingiz shart. Ko‘plab mijozlarga parkovka imkonini berish uchun maksimal parkovka vaqti ikki soat.
answerATarget: Gavjum piyoda harakatiga alohida e’tibor berishingiz kerak
answerBTarget: Ruxsat etilgan maksimal parkovka vaqtiga e’tibor berishingiz kerak
answerCTarget: 20 km/soat minimal tezlikka rioya qilishingiz kerak

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign indicates the end of an area in which the permitted speed was set to 30 km/h and thus cancels the maximum speed of 30 km/h.
answerASource: - a permitted maximum speed of 30 km/h
answerBSource: - an obligatory minimum speed of 30 km/h
answerCSource: - a recommended speed of 30 km/h
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu belgi ruxsat etilgan tezlik 30 km/soat bo‘lgan hudud tugaganini bildiradi va 30 km/soat maksimal tezlik cheklovini bekor qiladi.

questionTextSource: Are you allowed to drive at a speed faster than 60 km/h here?
explanationSource: Due to the additional sign, the maximum permissible speed of 60 km/h applies only in wet conditions. Decrease the speed of your vehicle accordingly, if the entire roadway is covered with a thin film of water and therefore counts as wet. If the road is dry or only damp, you are also allowed to drive faster than 60 km/h as a car driver.
answerASource: Yes, if the roadway is dry
answerBSource: Yes, if the roadway is wet
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda 60 km/soatdan tezroq yurishga ruxsat bormi?
explanationTarget: Qo‘shimcha belgi sabab 60 km/soat maksimal tezlik faqat nam yo‘l sharoitida amal qiladi. Agar butun qatnov qismi yupqa suv qatlami bilan qoplangan bo‘lsa va shuning uchun nam deb hisoblansa, tezlikni mos ravishda kamaytiring. Agar yo‘l quruq yoki faqat biroz nam bo‘lsa, avtomobil haydovchisi sifatida 60 km/soatdan tezroq yurishingiz ham mumkin.
answerATarget: Ha, agar qatnov qismi quruq bo‘lsa
answerBTarget: Ha, agar qatnov qismi nam bo‘lsa

questionTextSource: What do you do when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign dictates that you have to drive here at least at a speed of 60 km/h. Driving slower is only allowed if traffic safety requires it. A car driver may not use this road if he/she cannot or is not allowed to drive that fast due to the vehicle or its load or due to lack of personal abilities.
answerASource: You must drive at least at a speed of 60 km/h, weather and traffic conditions permitting
answerBSource: You may not use this road if you cannot or are not allowed to drive at least 60 km/h
answerCSource: You are not allowed to drive faster than 60 km/h
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi bu yerda kamida 60 km/soat tezlikda yurishingiz kerakligini bildiradi. Faqat yo‘l harakati xavfsizligi talab qilsa, sekinroq yurishga ruxsat beriladi. Agar transport vositasi yoki uning yuki sabab yoki shaxsiy qobiliyat yetishmasligi sabab bunday tezlikda yura olmasa yoki yurishga ruxsat etilmasa, haydovchi bu yo‘ldan foydalanmasligi kerak.
answerATarget: Ob-havo va harakat sharoiti imkon bersa, kamida 60 km/soat tezlikda yurishingiz kerak
answerBTarget: Kamida 60 km/soat tezlikda yura olmasangiz yoki bunga ruxsat bo‘lmasa, bu yo‘ldan foydalana olmaysiz

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are you allowed to overtake where you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The restriction on overtaking prohibits a car driver from overtaking multi-lane vehicles such as cars, trucks or tractors and motorcycles with side cars. Motorcycles without a side car and bicycles are allowed to be overtaken, as these are single-lane vehicles.
answerBSource: Motorcycle with sidecar
answerCSource: Car
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rgan joyda qaysi transport vositalarini quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Quvib o‘tish cheklovi avtomobil haydovchisiga avtomobillar, yuk mashinalari, traktorlar kabi ko‘p izli transport vositalarini va yon aravachali mototsikllarni quvib o‘tishni taqiqlaydi. Yon aravachasiz mototsikllar va velosipedlarni quvib o‘tishga ruxsat beriladi, chunki ular bir izli transport vositalaridir.

questionTextSource: What do these traffic signs indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign signals a restriction on overtaking on multi-lane motor vehicles or motorcycles with side car. The black arrows with the km indication indicate that the restriction on overtaking applies for 3 km. The restriction on overtaking comes into force starting from the traffic sign.
answerBSource: Start of a no-overtaking area 3 km ahead
answerCSource: Roadway with two lanes in one direction for 3 km
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi ko‘p izli motorli transport vositalari yoki yon aravachali mototsikllarni quvib o‘tish cheklovini bildiradi. Km ko‘rsatilgan qora strelkalar quvib o‘tish cheklovi 3 km davom etishini bildiradi. Quvib o‘tish cheklovi belgi o‘rnatilgan joydan boshlab kuchga kiradi.
answerBTarget: 3 km oldinda quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan hudud boshlanadi
answerCTarget: 3 km davomida bir yo‘nalishda ikki yo‘lakli qatnov qismi

questionTextSource: What do these traffic signs indicate?
explanationSource: With this traffic sign the car driver is prohibited to overtake multi-lane vehicles and motorcycles with side car. The additional sign prohibits overtaking in 200 meters. Since it contains no black arrows, it does not mean that you are not allowed to overtake in the next 200 meters.
answerASource: Start of a no-overtaking area 200 m ahead
answerBSource: No overtaking for 200 m
answerCSource: End of a no-overtaking area 200 m ahead
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi avtomobil haydovchisiga ko‘p izli transport vositalari va yon aravachali mototsikllarni quvib o‘tishni taqiqlaydi. Qo‘shimcha belgi 200 metrdan keyin quvib o‘tish taqiqlanishini bildiradi. Unda qora strelkalar yo‘qligi sabab, bu keyingi 200 metr davomida quvib o‘tish taqiqlanadi degani emas.
answerATarget: 200 m oldinda quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan hudud boshlanadi
answerCTarget: 200 m oldinda quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan hudud tugaydi

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign indicates the end of the speed limit of 60 km/h. The car driver may drive at the usual speed again.
answerBSource: A prohibition to drive faster than 60 km/h
answerCSource: Start of speed restriction
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi 60 km/soat tezlik cheklovi tugaganini bildiradi. Haydovchi yana odatdagi tezlikda harakatlanishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: Which prohibitions cease to apply when you see this sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign cancels all road restrictions. For example, road restrictions include restrictions on overtaking and speed limits. Stopping restrictions such as a parking ban are not covered by road restrictions.
answerBSource: Speed restrictions
answerCSource: No parking
questionTextTarget: Bu belgini ko‘rganda qaysi taqiqlar bekor bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi barcha yo‘l cheklovlarini bekor qiladi. Masalan, yo‘l cheklovlariga quvib o‘tish cheklovlari va tezlik cheklovlari kiradi. Parkovka taqiqi kabi to‘xtash cheklovlari yo‘l cheklovlariga kirmaydi.

questionTextSource: What do these traffic signs indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign signals the car driver that it is forbidden to come to a stop on the road. The additional sign extends the stopping restriction and also prohibits stopping on the side strip for all vehicles, not just for trucks.
answerASource: - on the roadway and the hard shoulder
answerBSource: - on the hard shoulder only
answerCSource: - for trucks only
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l belgisi haydovchiga yo‘lda to‘xtash taqiqlanganini bildiradi. Qo‘shimcha belgi to‘xtash cheklovini kengaytiradi va yon chiziqda ham barcha transport vositalari uchun to‘xtashni taqiqlaydi, faqat yuk mashinalari uchun emas.
answerATarget: - qatnov qismida va yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida

questionTextSource: What is allowed in the zone which starts here?
explanationSource: With the traffic sign "No parking. Waiting is allowed.", there is a restricted stopping ban in an entire area without stopping signs being placed here in certain streets. As a car driver, you are allowed to wait up to three minutes throughout the entire zone. Situations of loading and unloading or getting in and out of the car may also take longer.
answerBSource: Stopping for loading or unloading as well as boarding or alighting
answerCSource: Parking, provided a parking disc is used
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda boshlanayotgan hududda nimaga ruxsat berilgan?
explanationTarget: “Parkovka taqiqlangan. Kutishga ruxsat berilgan” belgisi bilan butun hududda ayrim ko‘chalarga alohida to‘xtash belgilarini qo‘ymasdan cheklangan to‘xtash taqiqi amal qiladi. Haydovchi sifatida butun hududda uch daqiqagacha kutishingiz mumkin. Yuk ortish-tushirish yoki avtomobilga chiqish-tushish holatlari uzoqroq davom etishi ham mumkin.
answerBTarget: Yuk ortish yoki tushirish, shuningdek chiqish yoki tushish uchun to‘xtash

questionTextSource: What ends here?
explanationSource: Here the no parking zone ends. Note that this traffic sign is often only on placed on the left side of the road and does not suspend the stopping restriction.
answerBSource: A no-stopping area
answerCSource: All previous zonal prohibitions
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda nima tugaydi?
explanationTarget: Bu yerda parkovka taqiqlangan hudud tugaydi. Bu belgi ko‘pincha faqat yo‘lning chap tomoniga qo‘yilishini va to‘xtash cheklovini bekor qilmasligini yodda tuting.

questionTextSource: When must you indicate?
explanationSource: If you enter the roundabout, you do not need to indicate this because the entrance to the circle is always to the right. On the other hand, if you leave the roundabout, you will need to indicate this to make it easier for other drivers to enter the circle.
answerBSource: When you enter the roundabout
questionTextTarget: Qachon signal berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Aylanma yo‘lga kirayotganda signal berish shart emas, chunki aylanmaga kirish har doim o‘ng tomondan bo‘ladi. Aksincha, aylanma yo‘ldan chiqayotganda signal berishingiz kerak, bu boshqa haydovchilarning aylanmaga kirishini osonlashtiradi.

questionTextSource: You are approaching this combination of traffic signs. What must you remember?
explanationSource: Vehicles driving in the roundabout have right of way. Indicating when entering the roundabout is not necessary, as a roundabout is always entered from the right. Therefore, the answer "Entering the roundabout must be indicated" is wrong. You only indicate when you leave a roundabout. This makes sense because this makes it easier for vehicles to enter the roundabout.
answerASource: Vehicles in the roundabout have priority
answerBSource: You must indicate to leave the roundabout
answerCSource: You must indicate when entering the roundabout
questionTextTarget: Siz bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasiga yaqinlashyapsiz. Nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Aylanma yo‘lda harakatlanayotgan transport vositalari ustunlikka ega. Aylanma yo‘lga kirayotganda signal berish shart emas, chunki aylanmaga kirish har doim o‘ng tomondan bo‘ladi. Shuning uchun “Aylanma yo‘lga kirish signal bilan bildirilishi kerak” javobi noto‘g‘ri. Signal faqat aylanma yo‘ldan chiqayotganda beriladi. Bu boshqa transport vositalarining aylanmaga kirishini osonlashtiradi.
answerATarget: Aylanma yo‘ldagi transport vositalari ustunlikka ega
answerBTarget: Aylanma yo‘ldan chiqishda signal berishingiz kerak
answerCTarget: Aylanma yo‘lga kirayotganda signal berishingiz kerak

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign mean?
explanationSource: You have to give priority to the vehicles driving in the roundabout. In the roundabout there is always an absolute stopping restriction. You only indicate when you leave a roundabout. This helps other cars to enter the roundabout. A general driving with walking speed in the roundabout is not required.
answerASource: Stopping on the roundabout is forbidden
answerBSource: You must indicate when entering the roundabout
answerCSource: You are only allowed to drive at walking speed
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Aylanma yo‘lda harakatlanayotgan transport vositalariga ustunlik berishingiz kerak. Aylanma yo‘lda doimo mutlaq to‘xtash cheklovi mavjud. Signal faqat aylanma yo‘ldan chiqayotganda beriladi. Bu boshqa avtomobillarning aylanmaga kirishiga yordam beradi. Aylanma yo‘lda umumiy tarzda piyoda tezligida yurish talab qilinmaydi.
answerBTarget: Aylanma yo‘lga kirayotganda signal berishingiz kerak

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign mean?
explanationSource: The traffic signs indicate that the drivers in the roundabout have priority. They also show that you do not need to indicate when entering the roundabout, as motorists can only enter the circle to the right. As soon as you leave the roundabout, you will need to indicate that to make it easier for other road users to enter the roundabout.
answerASource: You must give way to vehicles in the roundabout
answerBSource: You must indicate when leaving the roundabout
answerCSource: You must indicate when entering the roundabout
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l belgilari aylanma yo‘ldagi haydovchilar ustunlikka ega ekanini bildiradi. Shuningdek, aylanma yo‘lga kirayotganda signal berish shart emasligini ko‘rsatadi, chunki haydovchilar aylanmaga faqat o‘ng tomondan kirishi mumkin. Aylanma yo‘ldan chiqishingiz bilanoq, boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari aylanmaga kirishini osonlashtirish uchun signal berishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Aylanma yo‘ldagi transport vositalariga yo‘l berishingiz kerak
answerBTarget: Aylanma yo‘ldan chiqayotganda signal berishingiz kerak
answerCTarget: Aylanma yo‘lga kirayotganda signal berishingiz kerak

questionTextSource: What must you do when you see this combination of traffic signs?
explanationSource: When driving in, you must give priority to the vehicles in that are already in the roundabout. The circle may only be entered through the right. You only indicate when leaving the roundabout. This regulation makes it easier for drivers to enter the roundabout. When recognizing the turn signal, they can decide whether they can already enter the circle with due regard for due diligence.
answerASource: You must indicate right to leave the roundabout
answerBSource: When entering the roundabout, you must give way
answerCSource: You must enter to the left
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasini ko‘rganda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Kirishda allaqachon aylanma yo‘lda bo‘lgan transport vositalariga ustunlik berishingiz kerak. Aylanmaga faqat o‘ng tomondan kiriladi. Signal faqat aylanma yo‘ldan chiqayotganda beriladi. Bu qoida haydovchilarning aylanmaga kirishini osonlashtiradi. Burilish signalini ko‘rib, ular ehtiyotkorlik bilan aylanmaga kira oladimi-yo‘qmi qaror qila oladi.
answerATarget: Aylanma yo‘ldan chiqish uchun o‘ngga signal berishingiz kerak
answerBTarget: Aylanma yo‘lga kirayotganda yo‘l berishingiz kerak

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign identifies a cycle path that cyclists must use but is prohibited for other road users. Cyclists crossing the road have their own warning sign.
answerBSource: A "cyclists prohibited" zone
answerCSource: Cyclists crossing the carriageway
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi velosipedchilar foydalanishi shart bo‘lgan va boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari uchun taqiqlangan veloyo‘lakni bildiradi. Yo‘lni kesib o‘tayotgan velosipedchilar uchun alohida ogohlantirish belgisi bor.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign combination indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign announces that after a hundred meters you will find a priority road where you will find the traffic sign "Give way". In any case, you must stop there at the stop line or line of sight.
answerBSource: - "Give way."
answerCSource: - "Give way to oncoming traffic"
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l belgisi 100 metrdan keyin ustun yo‘lga chiqishingizni va u yerda “Yo‘l bering” belgisi bo‘lishini bildiradi. Har qanday holatda u yerda to‘xtash chizig‘ida yoki ko‘rish chizig‘ida to‘xtashingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "Footway" marks paths which may be used exclusively by pedestrians and cyclists up to 10 years. Car drivers, cyclists and other road users may not be traveling on these routes. However, exceptions may be regulated by additional signs.
answerBSource: A prohibition on cycles and mopeds
answerCSource: The start of a traffic-calming zone
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: “Piyodalar yo‘lagi” belgisi faqat piyodalar va 10 yoshgacha bo‘lgan velosipedchilar foydalanishi mumkin bo‘lgan yo‘llarni bildiradi. Haydovchilar, velosipedchilar va boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari bu yo‘llarda harakatlana olmaydi. Biroq qo‘shimcha belgilar bilan istisnolar belgilanishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What vehicles are permitted to use this road?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "No vehicles of any kind permitted" includes all vehicles. Only motor bicycles such as motorcycles and scooters and bicycles may be pushed here.
answerASource: Cycles and motorcycles that are pushed
answerBSource: Motor vehicles
answerCSource: Electric-powered vehicles
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘ldan qaysi transport vositalari foydalanishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: “Har qanday turdagi transport vositalari taqiqlangan” belgisi barcha transport vositalarini o‘z ichiga oladi. Faqat mototsikl, skuter va velosiped kabi ikki g‘ildirakli transportlarni bu yerda itarib olib o‘tish mumkin.
answerATarget: Itarib olib o‘tilayotgan velosipedlar va mototsikllar

questionTextSource: How must you act when driving a vehicle during permitted delivery times?
explanationSource: Since the traffic sign "Footway" is combined here with the additional sign "Delivery vehicles only", a distributor may drive on a road that is marked this way. You have to drive at walking speed, regardless of whether pedestrians are visible or not. Pedestrians have priority, you should be especially considerate of them.
answerASource: I may only drive at walking speed
answerBSource: I must keep a close look out for pedestrians
answerCSource: If there are no pedestrians in my vicinity, I may drive faster than walking speed
questionTextTarget: Ruxsat etilgan yetkazib berish vaqtlarida transport vositasini boshqarayotganda qanday harakat qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu yerda “Piyodalar yo‘lagi” belgisi “faqat yetkazib beruvchi transport” qo‘shimcha belgisi bilan birlashtirilganligi sabab, yetkazib beruvchi shunday belgilangan yo‘lda harakatlanishi mumkin. Piyodalar ko‘rinadimi-yo‘qmi, piyoda tezligida yurishingiz kerak. Piyodalar ustunlikka ega, ularga ayniqsa e’tiborli bo‘lishingiz kerak.
answerCTarget: Agar yaqinimda piyodalar bo‘lmasa, piyoda tezligidan tezroq yurishim mumkin

questionTextSource: What must you do upon seeing this traffic sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign indicates the prohibition to turn in order to drive in the opposite direction. Turning left, however, is allowed. This traffic sign does not only apply to dead ends.
answerASource: I may not perform a U-turn here
answerBSource: I am in a cul-de-sac and have to turn around
answerCSource: I may not turn left here
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi qarama-qarshi yo‘nalishga burilib qayrilishni taqiqlaydi. Biroq chapga burilish mumkin. Bu belgi faqat berk ko‘chalarga taalluqli emas.
answerATarget: Bu yerda qayrilib burilishim mumkin emas
answerBTarget: Men berk ko‘chadaman va qayrilishim kerak
answerCTarget: Bu yerda chapga burilishim mumkin emas

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: Starting from these traffic signs a maximum of 60 km/h may be driven, regardless of the weather conditions. In bad weather conditions, the speed must be reduced further. However, the traffic sign does not say that 60 km/h must always be driven in order to stay safe. There is no traffic sign for a recommended minimum speed.
answerASource: I may not drive faster than 60 km/h
answerBSource: There is absolutely no problem in driving at 60 km/h
answerCSource: The recommended minimum speed is 60 km/h
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilaridan boshlab ob-havo sharoitidan qat’i nazar maksimal 60 km/soat tezlikda yurish mumkin. Yomon ob-havoda tezlikni yanada kamaytirish kerak. Biroq belgi xavfsiz qolish uchun har doim 60 km/soat tezlikda yurish kerakligini bildirmaydi. Tavsiya etilgan minimal tezlik uchun bunday yo‘l belgisi yo‘q.
answerBTarget: 60 km/soat tezlikda yurishda mutlaqo muammo yo‘q

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign means "You must go straight ahead". You can only drive straight ahead and are not allowed to turn. The one-way street sign has the same colors but is rectangular.
answerASource: I may only drive straight ahead
answerBSource: I have priority over oncoming traffic
answerCSource: I am on a one-way road
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi “Faqat to‘g‘ri yuring” degani. Siz faqat to‘g‘ri yurishingiz mumkin va burilishga ruxsat yo‘q. Bir tomonlama ko‘cha belgisi ham xuddi shu ranglarda bo‘ladi, lekin to‘rtburchak shaklda.

questionTextSource: What do you do upon seeing this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The traffic signal "Give way" signals that you are driving on a subordinate road and the cross traffic has priority. Drive slowly and stay ready to brake so that you do not miss a vehicle that is entitled to drive.
answerASource: I approach at a moderate speed ready to brake
answerBSource: I allow the cross-wise moving traffic the right of way
answerCSource: If I am turning right, I am not obliged to wait
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: “Yo‘l bering” belgisi siz quyi darajali yo‘lda ketayotganingizni va kesishuvchi transport ustunlikka ega ekanini bildiradi. Sekin yaqinlashing va tormozga tayyor turing, shunda yurishga haqli transport vositasini o‘tkazib yubormay qolmaysiz.
answerATarget: Tormozga tayyor holda o‘rtacha tezlikda yaqinlashaman
answerCTarget: Agar o‘ngga burilayotgan bo‘lsam, kutishim shart emas

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign shows you a riding path. Here riders move with their horses. Other road users are not allowed to use this path.
answerASource: A bridle-path, which riders are required to use
answerBSource: A bridle-path, which may not be used by other road users
answerCSource: A path, which may not be used by riders
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi ot minish yo‘lini ko‘rsatadi. Bu yerda chavandozlar otlari bilan harakatlanadi. Boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari bu yo‘ldan foydalana olmaydi.
