answerATarget: Chavandozlar foydalanishi shart bo‘lgan ot yo‘li
answerBTarget: Boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari foydalana olmaydigan ot yo‘li

questionTextSource: What must you do upon seeing this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The sign "Stop! Yield to cross traffic" requires you to stop and thereby slow down the vehicle to a complete stop. It doesn't matter if there is a stop line or if cross traffic is coming.
answerBSource: - stop only if there is a stop line
answerCSource: - stop only if there is cross-wise moving traffic
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: “To‘xtang! Kesishuvchi transportga yo‘l bering” belgisi sizdan to‘xtashni va transport vositasini to‘liq to‘xtatishni talab qiladi. To‘xtash chizig‘i bor-yo‘qligi yoki kesishuvchi transport kelayotgan-kelmayotgani ahamiyatga ega emas.

questionTextSource: What do you have to do in this traffic situation?
explanationSource: At the traffic sign "Stop! Yield to cross traffic" you have to stop and give way. You always have to stop, even if there is no cross traffic. Since there is no stop line, stop at the line of sight. From the line of sight, you can see the street you want to enter.
answerASource: - stop at the line of sight and give way
answerBSource: - not stop, because there is no stop line
answerCSource: - stop only if there is cross-wise moving traffic
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l vaziyatida nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: “To‘xtang! Kesishuvchi transportga yo‘l bering” belgisi oldida to‘xtab, yo‘l berishingiz kerak. Kesishuvchi transport bo‘lmasa ham har doim to‘xtashingiz kerak. To‘xtash chizig‘i yo‘qligi sabab ko‘rish chizig‘ida to‘xtang. Ko‘rish chizig‘idan siz kirmoqchi bo‘lgan ko‘chani ko‘ra olasiz.

questionTextSource: What do you have to do in this traffic situation?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "Stop! Yield to cross traffic!" requires that you stop and give way. Since there is a stop line, you must stop at the stop line. If there is no stop line, you must stop at the line of sight and your wheels have to stop completely. You always have to stop, even if there is no cross traffic.
answerASource: - stop at the stop line and give way
answerBSource: - stop only at the stop sign
answerCSource: - stop only if there is cross-wise moving traffic
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l vaziyatida nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: “To‘xtang! Kesishuvchi transportga yo‘l bering!” belgisi to‘xtash va yo‘l berishni talab qiladi. To‘xtash chizig‘i bo‘lgani uchun unda to‘xtashingiz kerak. Agar to‘xtash chizig‘i bo‘lmasa, ko‘rish chizig‘ida to‘xtashingiz va g‘ildiraklar to‘liq to‘xtashi kerak. Kesishuvchi transport bo‘lmasa ham har doim to‘xtashingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: You are driving along a priority road. Which traffic sign ends your right of way?
explanationSource: Example 1 means "Yield", you must give priority to other road users. Sign 2 grants you right of way at the next intersection. Sign 3 only warns of a danger zone.
questionTextTarget: Siz ustun yo‘lda harakatlanyapsiz. Qaysi yo‘l belgisi sizning ustunligingizni tugatadi?
explanationTarget: 1-misol “Yo‘l bering” degani, siz boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga ustunlik berishingiz kerak. 2-belgi keyingi kesishmada sizga ustunlik beradi. 3-belgi faqat xavfli hudud haqida ogohlantiradi.

questionTextSource: What do you have to be aware of with this traffic sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign regulates the direction of travel. You may only turn left here. The change of the direction of travel must be indicated.
answerASource: I have to signal a left-turn
answerBSource: I may only continue driving by taking a left turn
answerCSource: I may not signal
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi bilan nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi harakat yo‘nalishini tartibga soladi. Bu yerda faqat chapga burilishingiz mumkin. Harakat yo‘nalishi o‘zgarishi signal bilan bildirilishi kerak.
answerATarget: Chapga burilishni signal bilan bildirishim kerak
answerBTarget: Faqat chapga burilib davom etishim mumkin

questionTextSource: What applies with this traffic sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign prescribes from which side you have to circuit the obstacle. You can find the regulation sign at central, stop islands or construction sites. If you meet the sign at an intersection or T-junction, you may turn in the appropriate direction.
answerASource: I have to drive past obstructions on the left
answerBSource: I am obliged to turn left
answerCSource: I may not turn right before the sign
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi bilan qanday qoida amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi to‘siqni qaysi tomondan aylanib o‘tishingiz kerakligini belgilaydi. Bunday buyruq belgisi markaziy orolchalarda, to‘xtash orolchalarida yoki qurilish joylarida uchraydi. Agar belgini chorraha yoki T-kesishmada uchratsangiz, tegishli yo‘nalishda burilishingiz mumkin.
answerATarget: To‘siqlar yonidan chap tomondan o‘tishim kerak
answerCTarget: Belgidan oldin o‘ngga burilishim mumkin emas

questionTextSource: What applies in the area 15 m in front of and behind this traffic sign?
explanationSource: At the traffic sign you can see that there is a tram or bus stop here. 15 meters before and after the traffic sign, drivers are not allowed to park their vehicles. Unless public transport is impeded or passengers are endangered, waiting is allowed for up to three minutes.
answerBSource: - not obstruct passengers boarding or alighting
answerCSource: - park
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisidan 15 m oldin va 15 m keyin qanday qoida amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l belgisidan bu yerda tramvay yoki avtobus bekati borligini ko‘rish mumkin. Belgidan 15 metr oldin va keyin haydovchilarga transport vositalarini parkovka qilish taqiqlanadi. Agar jamoat transportiga xalaqit berilmasa yoki yo‘lovchilarga xavf tug‘dirilmasa, uch daqiqagacha kutishga ruxsat beriladi.
answerBTarget: - yo‘lovchilarning chiqishi yoki tushishiga xalaqit bermaslik

questionTextSource: What applies with this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The given direction of travel is binding. The car driver must turn right before the traffic sign and indicate this process to other road users.
answerASource: I have to signal a right-turn
answerBSource: I may only continue driving by taking a right turn
answerCSource: I may also continue driving by taking a left turn
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi bilan qanday qoida amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Berilgan harakat yo‘nalishi majburiy. Haydovchi yo‘l belgisidan oldin o‘ngga burilishi va bu jarayonni boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga signal bilan bildirishi kerak.
answerATarget: O‘ngga burilishni signal bilan bildirishim kerak
answerBTarget: Faqat o‘ngga burilib davom etishim mumkin
answerCTarget: Chapga burilib ham davom etishim mumkin

questionTextSource: What applies with this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The traffic sign indicates a taxi stand. There is basically a stopping restriction for all other vehicles. The car driver must always expect departing and arriving taxis and passengers in this area.
answerASource: I have to anticipate taxi moving off and coming to a stop
answerBSource: I may stop
answerCSource: I may park
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi bilan qanday qoida amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi taksi turargohini bildiradi. Boshqa barcha transport vositalari uchun, qoida tariqasida, to‘xtash cheklovi mavjud. Haydovchi bu hududda taksilarning yo‘lga chiqishi va to‘xtashi hamda yo‘lovchilar bo‘lishini doimo kutishi kerak.
answerATarget: Taksilar harakatni boshlashi va to‘xtashini kutishim kerak
